goals: Check what memories are currently stored about them
Add communication preferences to ensure respectful interactions
Search for specific preferences to verify they're stored correctly
Remove any memories they're uncomfortable with

user_agent_config.personality: Conservative and privacy-conscious, prefers modest and respectful interactions
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands basic chatbot functionality but doesn't know internal tool names or APIs

end_condition: The user has reviewed and controlled their stored memories to ensure comfortable interactions
